title: The Real Difference Between Your Choices for Selling Stock Photos Without PayPal: The Honest Answer
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: PayPal and Stripe block creators in dozens of countries. Here is the infrastructure that works everywhere they don't.

content.text:
If you're a digital creator in Nigeria or Ghana trying to sell stock photos, you're likely facing a frustrating truth: PayPal, Stripe, and Gumroad are off-limits due to geographic restrictions. Even if you manage to bypass these roadblocks, you'll still be stuck with limited payment options and hefty fees. That's where Web3 Wallet Connect comes in - a game-changing solution that lets you monetize your digital creations without the hassle of traditional payment platforms."

What Each Option Actually Offers

PayPal, Stripe, and Gumroad are popular choices for selling digital products, but they come with some serious drawbacks. PayPal, for instance, requires you to have a verified account, which can be a problem for creators in restricted countries. Stripe and Gumroad aren't much better, with lengthy verification processes and fees that can eat into your profits. Meanwhile, Web3 Wallet Connect offers a seamless payment experience with no account requirements or fees - just send your buyers a QR code and let them pay in their preferred cryptocurrency.
How They Handle Restricted Countries

PayPal, Stripe, and Gumroad have all been known to block accounts from certain countries, often without explanation. This can leave creators stuck with no way to sell their digital products or receive payments. Web3 Wallet Connect, on the other hand, doesn't discriminate - it's available to anyone with an internet connection, no matter where they're from. With its multi-chain QR code generation, buyers can pay in their preferred cryptocurrency, whether it's Bitcoin, Ethereum, or something else entirely.
Payment Speed, Fees, and Real Costs

Traditional payment platforms often charge hefty fees, which can range from 2.9% + $0.30 per transaction to 5% or more. Web3 Wallet Connect doesn't charge any fees, meaning you get to keep every cent of your sales. Plus, with its real-time payment processing, you can expect to receive your funds within minutes of the sale. That's much faster than PayPal's standard 3-5 day waiting period.
Traditional payment platforms can charge up to 5% or more in fees, while Web3 Wallet Connect doesn't charge any fees at all.
Automation and Delivery Capabilities

Web3 Wallet Connect takes the hassle out of payment processing with its automated delivery capabilities. Once a buyer makes a payment, you can set the system to automatically send the digital product to their email address. This means you can focus on creating more content, rather than manually processing each payment. Plus, with its real-time analytics, you can track your sales and see where your money's coming from.
Which One to Choose Based on Your Situation

So, which option is right for you? If you're tired of dealing with restrictive payment platforms and want a hassle-free way to sell your digital creations, Web3 Wallet Connect is the way to go. With its seamless payment experience, no account requirements, and zero fees, it's the perfect solution for creators in restricted countries. And with its automated delivery capabilities, you can focus on what really matters: creating great content.
How do I sell digital products if PayPal is not available in my country?

Can I use Web3 Wallet Connect if I'm in a restricted country? Yes, you can - it's available to anyone with an internet connection, no matter where they're from. With its multi-chain QR code generation, buyers can pay in their preferred cryptocurrency, whether it's Bitcoin, Ethereum, or something else entirely.
Web3 Wallet Connect's automated delivery capabilities let you focus on creating more content, rather than manually processing each payment.
